prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Recurrent UTIs over the last 6 months with dysuria/frequency.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Diabetic Retinopathy
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.9 kg; Height 160.1 cm; BMI 21.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 146/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.2%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 269mg/dL; 9 months ago 234mg/dL; 6 months ago 239mg/dL; 3 months ago 216mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.9kg; 9 months ago 53.3kg; 6 months ago 55.2kg; 3 months ago 51.7kg; current 54.9kg), Height (12 months ago 160.1cm; 9 months ago 160.1cm; 6 months ago 160.1cm; 3 months ago 160.1cm; current 160.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 143mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 143mmHg; current 146mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 34U/L; 6 months ago 36U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 32U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; current 73mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 56mg/g; 9 months ago 52mg/g; 6 months ago 73mg/g; 3 months ago 72mg/g; current 69mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 123mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.1g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.94 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
